title: Museum Audio Tour
text:
## Museum Audio Tour — Stop {number}

Welcome to the {adjective} Gallery of {plural noun}.

Before you stands a {color} {object} discovered in {place} by {person}, a renowned {job}.

**Listen closely:** This piece was created by {verb ending in -ing} a {adjective} {animal} into art.

**Scholars believe:** It symbolizes {emotion} and the urge to {verb}.

**Fun fact:** In {number}, a visitor {past-tense verb} the display while eating {food}.

**Next stop:** The Hall of {adjective} {silly word}.
